## Collecting Imperfect Human Feedback {.nav-feedback}

{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/why-sampling.qmd >}}

## Sample Efficiency: Information Gain

{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/information-gain.qmd >}}

## Sample Efficiency: Thompson Sampling

{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/thompson-sampling.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sample-efficiency/discriminability.qmd >}} -->
